name: Custom data request
about: Request a custom report of Sprout data
title: ''

---

# Background

**What question are you hoping to answer with this Sprout data?**
Starting with your "research question" helps our data team select the right data.

**How do you hope to filter the Sprout data?**
Knowing how you want to filter the data will also help us select the right dataset.

# Description
Please concisely and clearly describe what data you're interested in, including:
* **Data start and end date:** (start month, past X months, etc.)
* **Time granularity:** (month, quarter, etc.)
* **Referral types:** (72-hour, ongoing, or both -- combined or broken out)
* **Supervision level:** (supervised, monitored, unsupervised -- combined or broken out)
* **Geography:** (region #, east/west, statewide -- combined or broken out)
* **Organization:** (NA, non-NA, specific orgs or workers)
* **Visit Participants:** (specific parents, children, referrals of interest)

**Data Needed By:**
When do you need this data by? Depending on the specifics, data requests can take some time to fulfill. The data team also aims to prioritize new data features over one-off data reports.
